attr.title: Evoland Legendary Edition
attr.desc: Evoland Legendary Edition contains both Evoland 1 and 2. Travel through the history of gaming as gameplay and graphics evolve from 2D to 3D across multiple genres.
attr.inst: Place the GOG installer files (setup_evoland_legendary_edition_1.0_(57388).exe and .bin) into evoland/gamedata/. Alternatively, copy sdlboot.dat and all .pak files from a Steam Linux install into evoland/gamedata/.
attr.inst_md:
The patcher will automatically patch the bytecode and compress textures on first launch. This takes about 10-30 minutes.

### Steam Instructions
* Open Steam console: `steam://open/console`
* Copy and paste command: `download_depot 1020470 1020471`
* Open the folder where this depot was downloaded and copy `sdlboot.dat` and all `.pak` files into the port's `gamedata` folder.
### GOG Instructions
Place the GOG installer files (setup_evoland_legendary_edition_1.0_(57388).exe and .bin) into evoland/gamedata/.
